zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Babington於1394年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾爾維爾時，她的父親William Babington26歲，母親Margery Martell27歲。她於大約1420年與Thomas de Neville在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1482年5月22日在英國諾廷加姆爾洛勒斯頓享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Babington于1394年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾爾維爾时，她的父亲William Babington26岁，母亲Margery Martell27岁。她于大约1420年与Thomas de Neville在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1482年5月22日在英国諾廷加姆爾洛勒斯頓享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Babington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name for someone from Babington in Somerset or Great or Little Bavington in Northumberland, which is recorded as Babington until the early 18th century. Both are named with the Old English personal name Babba (see Babb ) + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The name may also be derived from Bebington in Cheshire (see 2 below) or Bevington in Warwickshire (see Bevington , which has sometimes been altered in spelling by association with Babington).

English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of Bebbington, a habitational name from Bebington in Cheshire, from the Old English personal name Bebba + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The alteration to Bavington and Bevington shows a common development of -b- to -v- in placenames and surnames.

variants.name: Babb
meanings: English (Devon, Somerset, and Cornwall): from the Middle English personal name Babb(e), usually no doubt a pet form of the female personal name Barbara (see Barbara ), but possibly in some cases a survival of the Old English personal name Babba, which is found in several placenames, including Babbacombe in Devon and Babington in Somerset.
English (Devon, Somerset, and Cornwall): from Middle English babe ‘infant, young child’, applied as a nickname.
Americanized form of German   Bobb   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Bevington
meanings: (southwest Midlands): habitational name from either of two places, in Warwickshire and Gloucestershire, named Bevington, from the Old English personal name Bēofa + Old English -ing- implying association + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Babington was born in 1394, in Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, William Babington, was 26 and her mother, Margery Martell, was 27. She married Thomas de Neville about 1420, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 22 May 1482, in Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Babington est née en 1394, à Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, William Babington, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margery Martell, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Neville environ 1420, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 mai 1482, à Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Babington 1394 in Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Babington 26 und ihre Mutter Margery Martell 27. Sie hat um 1420 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas de Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Mai 1482 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Babington è nata il nel 1394 nel Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, William Babington, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Margery Martell, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Neville circa 1420, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 22 maggio 1482, nel Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Babingtonが1394年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアチルウエルで生まれた時，父William Babingtonは26歳，母Margery Martellは27歳であった。約1420年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでThomas de Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1482年5月22日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアロレストンで88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Babington(이)가 1394년 영국 노틴그함실르 치웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Babington(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Martell(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 Thomas de Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1482년 5월 22일 영국 노틴그함실르 롤레스턴에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Babington nasceu em 1394, em Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Babington, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margery Martell, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Neville aproximadamente 1420, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de maio de 1482, em Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Babington родилась в 1394 г. в местности чилвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Babington было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Martell, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Neville около 1420 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 22 мая 1482 г. в местности роллестон, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Babington nació en 1394, en Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Babington, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margery Martell, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Thomas de Neville aproximadamente 1420, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 22 de mayo de 1482, en Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 88 años.
